info.name: Novo API
info.description: Novo (novo.co) is a U.S. business banking platform for small businesses and freelancers. Novo does not publish a public, self-service developer API, developer portal, or webhooks; account and transaction data is accessed through aggregators such as Plaid, and integrations are productized in-app connections. No first-party Novo endpoints are documented, so this collection intentionally contains no requests. No endpoints are fabricated.

variable.description: Company web origin only; there is no documented public Novo API base URL.
